title: [IOS] Location sharing dialogue - Allow Once option is selected
scenario: After selecting "Allow Once" on iOS location sharing dialogue, the location consent prompt should reappear upon app restart.
steps: Start app for first time, finish onboarding → Home Screen shows location dialogue with options 'Allow Once', 'Allow While Using App', 'Don't Allow'.
Tap 'Allow Once', go to App Settings → Find My Device → FMD screen visible without location dialogue.
Restart app → Location dialogue should reappear on Home Screen (same as step 1).
expected: After restarting the app, the location dialogue should reappear on the Home Screen with the same options as step 1.
